overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a dystopian urban outskirts area. The player moves from a sidewalk past steam vents and billboards, crosses a busy intersection, and continues along a highway ramp toward the city center with towering skyscrapers visible in the distance. Bright midday sun illuminates the desert-cyberpunk environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk with steam vents and elevated highway

events.description: pedestrian in pink tank top passes close to camera on the right
approaching intersection, preparing to cross the street

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk, passing pedestrians and approaching an intersection with steam rising from vents

notable_agents.action: man in pink tank top walking toward camera then passing by
woman in white shirt walking away from camera down the sidewalk

entered.detail: large vertical billboard with 'PEEP SHOW' text and portrait of a woman
industrial steam rising from ground vents near the building facade
rusted metal elevated train track or highway with support columns
white concrete barriers lining the edge of the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunlit cyberpunk city sidewalk with a large peep show billboard on the left and steam rising from industrial vents ahead. The elevated highway structure runs parallel on the right. The camera walks forward past a pedestrian in a pink tank top, approaching an intersection with traffic barriers and palm trees visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with highway ramp entrance

events.description: crossing the street, vehicles waiting at traffic light
transitioning from intersection to highway ramp, leaving the commercial block behind

agents.ego_description: crossing the intersection diagonally toward the highway ramp, navigating around vehicles

notable_agents.action: blue truck and black car driving along the road parallel to the camera
teal and gray sports car waiting at the intersection

entered.detail: red street sign with white text reading 'Sequoia' mounted on a pole
makeshift shelters and tarps indicating a homeless encampment along the roadside
large industrial toll plaza structure spanning the highway ahead

segments.scene_description: The camera crosses a wide sunlit intersection with vehicles passing by, passing a red 'Sequoia' street sign. The scene transitions from the commercial block to a highway ramp entrance, with makeshift tents visible on the left and a large toll booth structure looming ahead. Traffic flows steadily as the camera navigates across the asphalt.

events.description: teal sports car and other vehicles pass by closely on the right
slight turn to the right as the highway curves toward the city center

agents.ego_description: walking along the highway shoulder, with vehicles passing by at moderate speed

notable_agents.action: teal vintage-style sports car with red rims driving past the camera

entered.detail: large industrial facility with multiple smokestacks and processing towers in the distance
bright yellow concrete dividers with black hazard stripes lining the highway edge
gantry-mounted traffic signals spanning across the highway lanes

segments.scene_description: Walking along a wide highway ramp with the toll booth now behind on the left. Vehicles including a distinctive teal sports car pass by on the right. The landscape opens up to reveal an industrial complex with smokestacks in the distance, while yellow concrete barriers line the road. The highway curves gently toward the distant city skyline.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway approach to downtown city center

events.description: city skyscrapers become prominent as the highway curves toward the urban core

agents.ego_description: continuing along the highway curve toward the city center, with towering skyscrapers now dominating the view ahead

entered.detail: massive skyscraper with illuminated '07' signage near the top, dominating the skyline
large yellow and blue billboard advertising '24/7 STORE' on the side of a building
cluster of futuristic high-rise towers and megastructures forming the city center

segments.scene_description: The final segment reveals the destination as the highway curves toward a dense cluster of futuristic skyscrapers. The massive tower with '07' signage dominates the center view, while a bright '24/7 STORE' billboard appears on the right. The industrial zone gives way to the commercial city center, with the camera walking steadily toward the towering urban core.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a gritty urban sidewalk through a highway transition and toward a towering futuristic city center. It begins on a sunlit sidewalk past a peep show billboard and rising industrial steam, moving forward past a pedestrian toward a wide intersection marked by palm trees and traffic barriers. As the camera crosses the asphalt and passes a red Sequoia street sign, the commercial block shifts into a highway ramp entrance characterized by makeshift tents and a looming toll booth. The scene then opens up along the wide ramp, where the camera passes a teal sports car and yellow concrete barriers while the landscape reveals distant industrial smokestacks. Finally, the highway curves to reveal a dense cluster of skyscrapers, with the camera walking steadily toward a massive tower featuring 07 signage and a bright 24/7 store billboard.
